name: DMFNet: Dual-Backbone Multiscale Fusion Network for Urban Scene Classification

description: arXiv:2607.16338v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This article presents DMFNet, a dual-backbone multiscale feature fusion framework with residual feature propagation and spatial attention for remote sensing scene classification. Existing approaches often face challenges in effectively capturing multiscale feature interactions and learning robust feature representations from complex aerial scene...
author: Anamitra Ghosh, Abhiroop Chatterjee, Susmita Ghosh
